prompt: Create a realistic smartphone-style photo from the spectator seats at a Korean professional baseball game in a large outdoor stadium during daylight. In the foreground, show one young East Asian woman fan seated close to the camera, upper body visible, wearing a navy Lotte Giants baseball jersey over a white top, with a Lotte Giants patch on the sleeve, Korean sponsor patches, a delicate necklace, and dark hair tied back; her face is covered by a large soft rectangular privacy blur. She holds one clear plastic iced drink cup with a straw near the lower right. Around her are crowded green stadium seats filled with baseball fans, including several people in white pinstriped Lotte Giants jerseys with Korean names on the back and one person checking a smartphone. In the background, show the baseball field from an elevated first-base-side seating angle: bright striped green outfield grass, reddish-brown infield dirt, outfield wall advertisements in Korean, distant players in white uniforms positioned on the field, and packed stands. Add a realistic TV broadcast scoreboard graphic overlay in the bottom-right corner: a red LIVE tag, header text reading “KBO - LOTTE GIANTS vs KIA TIGERS,” exactly 2 team rows labeled “LOTTE GIANTS” and “KIA TIGERS,” both scores 0, a small inning indicator showing 2, ball/strike/out style indicators, a 0-0 count, and a black diamond base graphic with 4 bases. Make the image feel candid, natural, slightly wide-angle, with authentic Korean baseball atmosphere, crisp details, and no studio lighting. Use Lotte Giants navy jersey, KIA Tigers, 0-0, Korean outdoor baseball stadium, and large soft rectangular face blur.
